## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `node --test tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `node scripts/proof.mjs` passes (governed loop intact)
- [ ] No customer data, private memory content, real paths or credentials in any file
- [ ] Synthetic data only in tests and examples
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO — see [DCO.md](../DCO.md))
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-visible behavior changed
